revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:UF-hcard-org]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:UF-hcard-org]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>
#redirect[[en:Template:UF-hcard-org]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:UF-hcard-org]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>
#redirect[[:en:Template:UF-hcard-org]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:UF-hcard-org]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]" to " <noinclude>[[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects U]]</noinclude>"
Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects U

revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCard | data = an organization's details
| subtemplates = * Use {{#ifeq:{{yesno-yes|{{{age|}}}}}|yes|{{tl|Start date and age}}|{{tl|Start date}}}} for the date on which an organisation was "established", "founded", "opened" or otherwise started, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|unless that date is before 1583 CE]]. * Use {{tl|URL}} for an organisation's URL.
|adr |agent |category |country-name |extended-address |fn |geo |label |latitude |locality |longitude |nickname |note |org |region |street-address |url |vcard | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| [[Category:Templates generating hCards]] }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]] [[Category:Templates generating hCards| ]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Templates generating hCards
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCard | data = an organization's details
| subtemplates = * Use {{#ifeq:{{yesno-yes|{{{age|}}}}}|yes|{{tl|Start date and age}}|{{tl|Start date}}}} for the date on which an organisation was "established", "founded", "opened" or otherwise started, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|unless that date is before 1583 CE]]. * Use {{tl|URL}} for an organisation's URL.
|adr |agent |category |country-name |extended-address |fn |geo |label |latitude |locality |longitude |nickname |note |org |region |street-address |url |vcard | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCard | data = an organization's details
| subtemplates = * Use {{#ifeq:{{yesno-yes|{{{age|}}}}}|yes|{{tl|Start date and age}}|{{tl|Start date}}}} for the date on which an organisation was "established", "founded", "opened" or otherwise started, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|unless that date is before 1583 CE]]. * Use {{tl|URL}} for an organisation's URL.
|adr |agent |category |country-name |extended-address |fn |geo |label |latitude |locality |longitude |nickname |note |org |region |street-address |url |vcard | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]
</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCard | data = an organization's details
| subtemplates = * Use {{#ifeq:{{yesno-yes|{{{age|}}}}}|yes|{{tl|Start date and age}}|{{tl|Start date}}}} for the date on which an organisation was "established", "founded", "opened" or otherwise started, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|unless that date is before 1583 CE]]. * Use {{tl|URL}} for an organisation's URL.
|adr |agent |category |country-name |extended-address |fn |geo |label |latitude |locality |longitude |nickname |note |org |region |street-address |url |vcard | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other||

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCard | data = an organization's details
| subtemplates = * Use {{#ifeq:{{yesno-yes|{{{age|}}}}}|yes|{{tl|Start date and age}}|{{tl|Start date}}}} for the date on which an organisation was "established", "founded", "opened" or otherwise started, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|unless that date is before 1583 CE]]. * Use {{tl|URL}} for an organisation's URL.

</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Microformat message | format = hCard | data = an organization's details
| subtemplates = * Use {{#ifeq:{{yesno-yes|{{{age|}}}}}|yes|{{tl|Start date and age}}|{{tl|Start date}}}} for the date on which an organisation was "established", "founded", "opened" or otherwise started, [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Microformats/dates|unless that date is before 1583 CE]]. * Use {{tl|URL}} for an organisation's URL.
|adr |agent |category |country-name |extended-address |fn |geo |label |latitude |locality |longitude |nickname |note |org |region |street-address |url |vcard | nocollapse = on }}<includeonly>{{sandbox other||
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation |content={{Microformat message templates}}}}
[[Category:Microformat (uF) message templates]]
</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
